summary: SSE Real-Time Sync testing completed successfully. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend SSE sync verified working on Dashboard, Members, Speakers, and Treasury pages. The critical fix (POST /api/attendance/{date} broadcast) is confirmed working.
passed_tests: Backend - SSE endpoint rejects invalid token (401)
Backend - SSE endpoint accepts valid token (text/event-stream)
Backend - POST /api/attendance/{date} returns success and broadcasts 'attendance_updated'
Backend - POST /api/members creates member and broadcasts 'members_updated'
Backend - PUT /api/members/{id} updates member and broadcasts 'members_updated'
Backend - DELETE /api/members/{id} deletes member and broadcasts 'members_updated'
Backend - POST /api/speakers adds speaker and broadcasts 'speakers_updated'
Backend - POST /api/speakers/import-csv imports speakers and broadcasts 'speakers_updated'
Backend - POST /api/treasury creates entry and broadcasts 'treasury_updated'
Backend - POST /api/settings/msp-validity updates setting and broadcasts 'members_updated'
Backend - POST /api/settings/speaker-interval updates setting and broadcasts 'speakers_updated'
Backend - POST /api/import imports data and broadcasts all event types
Backend - POST /api/guests creates guest and broadcasts 'attendance_updated'
Frontend - Dashboard SSE sync: Taxa value updates automatically when changed via API
Frontend - Members page SSE sync: New member appears automatically when created via API
Frontend - Speakers page SSE sync: New speaker appears automatically when added via API
Frontend - Treasury page SSE sync: Total updates automatically when entry added via API
Frontend - Navigation sidebar works correctly for all pages

dashboard.test: Set taxa to 753 via API, UI updated automatically from 999 to 753

members.test: Created member 'TEST_SSE_SYNC Member199' via API, appeared in list automatically

speakers.test: Added speaker 'TEST_SSE Speaker199' via API, appeared in history automatically

treasury.test: Added +49 RON entry via API, total updated from 2,100 to 2,149 RON automatically

seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing was cleaned up (TEST_SSE_SYNC members deleted)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SSE Real-Time Sync is fully working. The critical fix (POST /api/attendance/{date} missing broadcast) has been verified. All pages (Dashboard, Members, Speakers, Treasury) correctly listen for SSE events and refresh data automatically. EventSource connects to /api/events?token=JWT. Email sending remains MOCKED (requires SMTP configuration).
